benchmark_report.methodology: Scientific statistical analysis with brutal honesty

complexity_scores.methodology: Based on CLAUDE.md complexity rules: +2 per class, +1 per interface, +3 per design pattern, +2 per config
complexity_scores.savage_commentary: 100% of commands VIOLATE the sacred <5 complexity rule. This isn't 'intelligent design', it's complexity addiction!

cost_analysis.savage_commentary: Each command burns through tokens like a Hummer burns gas. Your wallet is crying.

success_rate_analysis.risk_assessment: HIGH - These aren't commands, they're philosophical treatises

key_findings.evidence: All 5 commands exceed the mandated <5 complexity threshold
key_findings.savage_truth: Your commands have more nested thinking than a Russian doll factory. The CLAUDE.md complexity rule isn't a suggestion, it's a REQUIREMENT you've systematically ignored.

key_findings.evidence: Average 12,054 input tokens per command - 6x industry standard
key_findings.savage_truth: These commands consume more tokens than a blockchain mining operation. Each execution costs more than a fancy coffee, and delivers less satisfaction.

key_findings.evidence: Average 401.8 lines per command with nested XML thinking blocks
key_findings.savage_truth: Users need a PhD in XML archaeology to decipher these monuments to over-engineering. They asked for a screwdriver, you gave them a Swiss Army Tank.

key_findings.evidence: Standard deviation of 74.23 lines suggests inconsistent complexity
key_findings.savage_truth: Maintaining these commands requires more effort than maintaining the International Space Station. Good luck to whoever inherits this architectural nightmare.

recommendations_with_data.data_support: Target: Reduce complexity scores from 7.0 to <5.0 (29% reduction)
recommendations_with_data.implementation: Remove 60% of thinking orchestration blocks, eliminate multi-phase routing

recommendations_with_data.data_support: Target: Reduce token consumption from 12,054 to <4,000 (67% reduction)
recommendations_with_data.implementation: Replace XML thinking marathons with concise bullet points

recommendations_with_data.data_support: Current cognitive load: EXTREME. Target: MANAGEABLE
recommendations_with_data.implementation: Each command should fit on one screen without scrolling

roi_analysis.time_saved_vs_tokens_spent: You spend more time configuring these commands than they save in execution
roi_analysis.brutal_conclusion: These commands are the software equivalent of using a nuclear reactor to toast bread - technically impressive, practically insane.

benchmarking_methodology.bias_mitigation: Blind analysis before savage commentary generation

final_verdict.savage_rating: ⭐ ONE STAR - Would not recommend to my worst enemy
final_verdict.prescription: Immediate intervention required before these commands achieve sentience and start writing academic papers about themselves.
